title: Vanilla Remake Shader
description: is a clean, optimized shaderpack designed to re-imagine vanilla Minecraft.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366ee515600924487a6a5034d4fde7c1ab3ce059.png)
**Vanilla Remake Shader** is a clean, optimized shaderpack designed to re-imagine vanilla Minecraft. Built from scratch with an **ACES filmic tonemap**, it delivers bright, vibrant, and natural colors without washing out highlights. Instead of hyper-realistic effects, it enhances the game's classic square identity with stylized blocky clouds, square sun/moon billboards, and shimmering volumetric god rays.
